name: lossless-openclaw-orchestrator
description: Index, search, and prepare local Codex sessions with LCO, including one-shot thread title aliases for easier recall.

interface.shortDescription: Local Codex indexing and one-shot title aliases
interface.longDescription: LCO keeps Codex session recall local-first by indexing public-safe metadata and running the Stop hook thread-title finalizer after assistant stops, so agents can find threads by generated names and IDs without reading raw histories. This bundle is not a general tool surface.
defaultPrompt: Find the thread for this LCO task
